scenario: Agent sent T3 production task without clearing context from T2 draft phase
trigger: Context at 85% when T3 task dispatched
failure_mode: Context overflow causing hallucination in production output
recovery_tactic: Always check context budget before cross-track dispatch

scenario: MMA score oscillating between 5.8 and 6.2 on T2 gate — fix loop consuming cycles without convergence
trigger: Fix count at 2, score not improving
action_taken: Changed specialist skill from copy_lead to copy_director for fresh perspective
recovery_tactic: Rotate team member when fix loop stalls on same score band

scenario: T4 polish phase running at T2 speed — agent rushing through resonance optimization
trigger: Cycle times averaging 2 minutes in T4 instead of target 15-30
action_taken: Enforced cadence floor by adding mandatory review checkpoint between each T4 cycle
failure_mode: Cadence drift — fast cycles in slow phase producing shallow polish
recovery_tactic: Add explicit pause-and-review gates in T4 to force deliberate synthesis

scenario: Human gate between T1 and T2 skipped due to agent autonomy setting
trigger: Agent advanced from research to draft without SSOT approval
action_taken: Rolled back to T1, re-presented findings for human approval
failure_mode: SSOT drift — draft phase started with unvalidated research
recovery_tactic: Human gates are non-negotiable regardless of autonomy settings
